hero.title: Make Odoo simple for your finance, sales, purchase, and inventory teams.
hero.subtitle: I help businesses understand, configure, and use Odoo without confusion - from accounting setup and VAT reporting to inventory valuation, reconciliation, and team training.
hero.note: Focused on practical implementation, automation, reporting, and client training.

stats.label: Combined Odoo, audit, and finance experience
Audit, taxation, and reporting clients handled

about.title: Odoo consulting with an accounting-first mindset
about.subtitle: Built for businesses that need Odoo to be practical, clean, and easy for non-technical users.
paragraphs: I am a finance and accounting professional with hands-on experience in Odoo ERP implementation, auditing, financial reporting, compliance, and business process automation.
My work focuses on helping teams set up Odoo properly, understand the workflow, reduce manual work, and improve the accuracy of financial and operational reporting.

services.title: Odoo Implementation
services.description: Step-by-step implementation for companies moving from manual processes, Excel, or legacy accounting software to Odoo.
bullets: Company and chart of accounts setup

services.title: Odoo Accounting Setup
services.description: Accounting-focused configuration for invoices, bills, bank statements, VAT/TDS reporting, reconciliation, and financial reports.

services.title: Inventory & Valuation Support
services.description: Support for inventory booking, stock valuation, cost tracking, and issue resolution for trading, import, and operational businesses.

services.title: Automation & Reports
services.description: Automation to reduce manual entries and create useful reporting for finance and management teams.

services.title: User Training
services.description: Beginner-friendly training for finance, sales, purchase, inventory, repair, and operations users.

services.title: Odoo Support & Optimization
services.description: Support for existing Odoo users who need smoother workflows, issue fixes, cleaner configuration, and better adoption.

process.title: A simple Odoo implementation process
process.subtitle: The goal is not only to install Odoo, but to make your team comfortable using it every day.

steps.title: 1. Understand current process
steps.description: Review how your sales, purchase, inventory, accounting, repair, expenses, and reporting work today.

steps.title: 2. Map Odoo workflow
steps.description: Design the right Odoo flow before configuration so users understand what will change and why.

steps.title: 3. Configure and test
steps.description: Set up modules, reports, taxes, valuation, users, approvals, and automation with test transactions.

steps.title: 4. Train and support
steps.description: Train users in simple language, solve issues, and improve configuration after real usage feedback.

Designed cost center structures for import operations to improve financial tracking.
Optimized Sales, Purchase, Inventory, Repair, and Expenses modules for smoother operations.
